title: Our Mr. Wrenn: The Romantic Adventures of a Gentle Man
summaries: "Our Mr. Wrenn: The Romantic Adventures of a Gentle Man" by Sinclair Lewis is a novel published in 1914. When a meek novelty toy company employee unexpectedly inherits a fortune from his late father, he makes a bold decision: quit his mundane job and travel the world. This first novel published under Lewis's real name follows an ordinary man's extraordinary leap into adventure, chronicling what happens when an unambitious dreamer suddenly has the means to transform his life.
